name: Sante Technology Holdings Inc.
summary: Sante Technology Holdings Inc. produces, sells, and distributes building materials in the United States and internationally. It offers insulated concrete for structural wall systems, insulated panel building systems, roofing materials, pre-fabricated interlocking steel trusses, and standing seam roof panel systems. The company was formerly known as PEI Worldwide Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to Sante Technology Holdings Inc. in May 2020. Sante Technology Holdings Inc. was founded in 1999 and is based in Plano, Texas.
